name: Fiona
title: The Maker
mechanicsDetail: Mystic Mechanics: Shields, Shards, Debuffs, Stall.

startingAbility.name: Vault Spark
startingAbility.rawText: Spark a protective vault. Apply 250 (+250% Magic) Shields to the 1 (+1 per 12 Mana Regen) lowest current % Max HP Heroes.

rankBSpecializations.name: The Right Hand
rankBSpecializations.rawText: Every 5 casts, create a random item and gain 2 (+1 per rank) Shards.

rankBSpecializations.name: The Lustrous
rankBSpecializations.rawText: On cast, gain 33% Max Health Shields. Whenever an enemy damages a Shielded Hero, inflict 0 (+1 per rank) Burn on that enemy per 20 Shields removed. Backup.

rankBSpecializations.name: The Tycoon
rankBSpecializations.rawText: Every 5 casts, gain a Tycoon stack. At start of combat, Heroes gain 75 (+4 per 1 Mana Regen) Max HP per Tycoon stack. Backup.

quote: I've got all we need here with me.
